name: Federation
endgame_intro: We have examined your simulation results.
endgame: Your name will strike terror in our enemies' hearts!
We find you a worthy starship commander.
You should be a more aggressive commander.
Disciplinary action may be recommended.
You couldn't command a garbage scow.
Your disgusting performance sickens us!
You don't deserve to be called a Klingon!

name: Klingon Empire
endgame_intro: The review of your simulation records has been completed.
endgame: It would be an honor to assign you a fleet command!
Your abilities are admired by many.
You should be proud of your tactical abilities.
You show promise as a starship commander.
Your performance casts a shadow on your family's name.
The shame of your defeat reflects on all Romulan commanders!
After this performace you have but one alternative...

name: Romulan Empire
endgame_intro: We have seen the outcome of this simulation.
endgame: We can't believe it!  What fleet are you trying to join!
After that impressive performance, the drinks are on you!
Not bad for someone of your caliber.
We've seen more exciting simulations.
After that lousy performance, the drinks are on you!
A fast exit might have been a better idea.
What a joke.

name: Orion Pirate Fleet
endgame_intro: The Orion Pirate Guild has tallied the take.
endgame: Legendary!  Every cutthroat in the quadrant knows your name.
A fine haul.  The Guild drinks to you tonight.
Profitable enough.  You keep your ship.
You broke even.  Barely.
That cargo won't pay for the repairs.
The Guild is repossessing your ship.
Pathetic.  Even the Ferengi are laughing.
